requirement_topic.en: EMC for PCS, BMS, Control Electronics, and Communications

summary.en: BESS power conversion systems, BMS, controls, metering, and communications equipment can create electromagnetic emissions and must remain immune to disturbances. Public sources reviewed do not confirm a single Egypt national EMC certification mandate for complete BESS units; EMC evidence is usually driven by EOS adopted standards, GOEIC / import scope for listed electronics, utility interconnection requirements, telecom approvals for radio modules, and project specifications.
summary.zh: BESS功率变换系统、BMS、控制、计量和通信设备可能产生电磁发射，也必须具备抗扰度。已查阅公开来源未确认埃及对完整BESS单元存在单一国家EMC认证强制要求；EMC证据通常由EOS采标、列明电子产品的GOEIC/进口范围、公用事业并网要求、无线模块电信批准及项目规范驱动。
summary.zht: BESS功率變換系統、BMS、控制、計量和通訊設備可能產生電磁發射，也必須具備抗擾度。已查閱公開來源未確認埃及對完整BESS單元存在單一國家EMC認證強制要求；EMC證據通常由EOS採標、列明電子產品的GOEIC／進口範圍、公用事業併網要求、無線模組電信批准及項目規範驅動。

standards_or_laws: EOS adopted EMC standards where confirmed for the product scope
IEC / CISPR EMC standards requested by the project or utility
GOEIC import conformity or telecom approvals for listed electronic or radio components where applicable

summary.en: China-side EMC evidence for BESS electronics may include GB 4824 for industrial, scientific and medical equipment radio disturbance, GB/T 17799 generic EMC standards, and safety / EMC files for PCS, BMS, and ICT equipment. These reports should be mapped to the Egyptian or IEC / CISPR clauses requested by the buyer or authority.
summary.zh: 中国侧BESS电子设备EMC证据可能包括工业、科学和医疗设备无线电骚扰GB 4824、GB/T 17799通用EMC标准，以及PCS、BMS和ICT设备安全/EMC文件。这些报告应映射至买方或主管机关要求的埃及或IEC/CISPR条款。
summary.zht: 中國側BESS電子設備EMC證據可能包括工業、科學和醫療設備無線電騷擾GB 4824、GB/T 17799通用EMC標準，以及PCS、BMS和ICT設備安全／EMC文件。這些報告應映射至買方或主管機關要求的埃及或IEC／CISPR條款。

gap.en: Separate the EMC file by subsystem: PCS emissions and immunity, BMS and control electronics, metering and communications, radio modules, enclosure grounding and bonding, surge / lightning protection, and site integration. Confirm whether the customer requires IEC 61000 series, CISPR 11 / 32, EN equivalents, EOS adopted versions, or local lab evidence.
gap.zh: 应按子系统拆分EMC资料：PCS发射和抗扰度、BMS和控制电子、计量与通信、无线模块、外壳接地和等电位连接、浪涌/防雷，以及现场集成。确认客户是否要求IEC 61000系列、CISPR 11/32、EN等效标准、EOS采标版本或当地实验室证据。
gap.zht: 應按子系統拆分EMC資料：PCS發射和抗擾度、BMS和控制電子、計量與通訊、無線模組、外殼接地和等電位連接、浪湧／防雷，以及現場整合。確認客戶是否要求IEC 61000系列、CISPR 11／32、EN等效標準、EOS採標版本或當地實驗室證據。

mandatory_status.target: Project, import, telecom, utility, or EOS-scope dependent; no cited blanket complete-BESS EMC certification mandate confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or recommended depending on the Chinese product category, GB standard, CCC scope, and project requirements

source.publisher: Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality (EOS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat EMC as a subsystem and project requirement for Egypt BESS unless a specific EOS, GOEIC, telecom, utility, or contract document makes a defined EMC route mandatory.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 除非具体EOS、GOEIC、电信、公用事业单位或合同文件规定了明确EMC路径，否则埃及BESS的EMC应按子系统和项目要求处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 除非具體EOS、GOEIC、電信、公用事業單位或合約文件規定了明確EMC路徑，否則埃及BESS的EMC應按子系統和項目要求處理。
